title: Alcohol on beaches strictly prohibited
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Mossel Bay Municipality has reminded its residents and holidaymakers that the use and possession of alcohol on local beaches is strictly prohibited.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Municipality has reminded its residents and holidaymakers that the use and possession of alcohol on local beaches is strictly prohibited."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"This prohibition has been put in place to ensure the safety of all beach-goers, to promote a family-friendly environment and to support law enforcement and community well-being."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Law enforcement, the SAPS and community safety partners are closely monitoring the beaches, with CCTV monitoring and patrols supporting enforcement,\" said the municipality.","html":"\"Law enforcement, the SAPS and community safety partners are closely monitoring the beaches, with CCTV monitoring and patrols supporting enforcement,\" said the municipality."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Notices and fines will be issued where necessary. We urge everyone to respect this regulation and help keep Mossel Bay's beaches safe, welcoming spaces for all.\"","html":"\"Notices and fines will be issued where necessary. We urge everyone to respect this regulation and help keep Mossel Bay's beaches safe, welcoming spaces for all.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
